---
format:
  html:
    author: "Simon Allzén"
    title: "Term Normalization"
    subtitle: "_Shared Research Infrastructure_"
    theme:
      dark: darkly
      light: flatly
    mainfont: "Fraunces"
    fontsize: "10pt"
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
    tabset: true
    minimal: true
    max-width: "1600"
    smooth-scroll: true
    page-layout: article
    df-print: kable
    mermaid:
      theme: neutral

  gfm:
    toc: false
    output-file: README.md
---

# Dark-Matter Term Normalization

Canonical shared package for dark-matter term normalization, candidate label mapping, and TF-IDF preprocessing helpers.
